creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Hmm... gnucash shouldn't be building at all at the moment since I 
marked lang/scheme48 (one of its dependencies) as broken a few days ago. 

I know someone sent me some patches to remove the scheme48 dependency 
from gnucash.. I'll have to dig them out and apply them.
